articles.author: MacKenzie Sigalos
articles.title: Apple commits $30 billion to Broadcom for U.S. chipmaking push - CNBC
articles.description: Apple is expanding its Broadcom partnership in a $30 billion-plus chipmaking agreement, its largest American manufacturing commitment to date.
articles.content:
Apple said it's expanding its partnership with chipmaker Broadcom in a multi-year deal expected to exceed $30 billion, marking the iPhone maker's largest U.S. manufacturing commitment to date.
